creator: a.ulasov@gmail.com
text:
Since the default Ghostscript port has been changed from print/ghostscript9-base
to print/ghostscript9-agpl-base some pdf files convert to empty JPEG files. If I use print/ghostscript9-base and  'convert' from ImageMagick-nox11, all pdf files converts to jpeg succesfully. But if I use print/ghostscript9-agpl-base and same 'convert' from ImageMagick-nox11, some pdf files coverts to empty jpeg. See convert's output in both cases. I tried it on FreeBSD 10.2-RELEASE-p19 amd64, ImageMagick-nox11 and (print/ghostscript9-agpl-base | print/ghostscript9-base) were compiled with defaults options. I assume that some devices are missing in the file Makefile.drivers.
